records.translation_boundary: OPA decisions enter StegVerse as policy evidence only; identity, delegation, scope, freshness, recoverability, execution context, and consequence authority remain independently evaluated.
records.next_action: Observe the fresh-runner pipeline producing and uploading the bounded OPA-to-StegVerse governance compatibility receipt.
Execute the pinned Cedar binary against shared request, policy, schema, and entity fixtures; then rerun the governance translation contract using captured Cedar responses.

records.translation_boundary: SPIFFE identity verification contributes workload identity evidence only; identity verification does not establish current delegation, action authority, admissibility, or execution permission.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned SPIRE attestation, SVID issuance, trust-bundle, rotation, and verification packet, then execute and replay the identity-to-governance translation contract.

records.translation_boundary: Credential verification contributes claim and status evidence only; credential verification does not establish claim truth, current delegation, action authority, or transition admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned credential, presentation, proof suite, issuer, resolver, schema, and status packet; execute verification and replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: Provenance verification contributes historical process and custody evidence only; provenance verification does not establish current delegation, deployment authority, transition admissibility, or execution permission.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned in-toto implementation, signed layout and link bundle, keys, raw verifier output, and fresh-runner replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: SLSA provenance verification contributes build and artifact assurance evidence only; it does not establish current deployment authority or runtime admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned SLSA-compatible provenance producer and verifier, provenance bundle, artifact digest, raw verifier output, and fresh-runner replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: Sigstore signature verification contributes artifact integrity, signing-identity, certificate, and transparency evidence only; signature verification does not establish current delegation, action authority, deployment permission, or transition admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned Sigstore client, trust roots, signed artifact, certificate, transparency proof, raw verifier output, and fresh-runner replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: OpenID Connect authentication contributes provider-asserted identity evidence only; authentication does not establish current delegation, action authority, target permission, or transition admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned provider and relying party, discovery metadata, key-set snapshot, ID Token, raw validation transcript, and fresh-runner replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: OAuth token acceptance contributes bounded delegation and scope evidence only; token acceptance does not establish universal authority, consequence-binding permission, or transition admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned authorization server, resource server, client, grant, token, scope, raw issuance and enforcement transcripts, and fresh-runner replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: DID resolution and proof verification contribute identifier and control evidence only; DID control does not establish current delegation, action authority, target permission, or transition admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned DID method, resolver, method-state source, DID document, proof fixture, raw resolution and verification outputs, and fresh-runner replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: OSCAL schema validation and assessment records contribute structured control evidence only; control evidence does not establish implementation truth, current delegation, execution authority, or transition admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned OSCAL release, schemas, source package, validator, transformation and reference-resolution outputs, and independent reconstruction before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.translation_boundary: OpenLineage lineage visibility contributes event, dataset, job, run, custody, and freshness evidence only; lineage visibility does not establish verified truth, current delegation, governance authority, or transition admissibility.
records.next_action: Attach a pinned producer, transport, consumer, event schema, captured event stream, custody and ordering evidence, and independent replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.next_action: Attach a pinned PROV implementation, serialization profile, source mapping, generated document, validation or query transcript, custody evidence, and independent replay before promoting bounded compatibility.

records.next_action: Attach pinned MCP client and server implementations, tool registry and schemas, authorization inputs, raw protocol traces, runtime configuration, and independent replay before promoting bounded compatibility.
